_preset: team — adds shared-delivery discipline on top of solo: a protected default branch, PR review ≥1, every declared environment with an automated deploy path, IaC that isn't console-clicking, and a documented hotfix path. BR-03 and ENV-04 are WARNINGS at this tier (they become blockers at critical). Copy to <repo>/pipeline.repo.json and set the fields to reality — especially the environment names and branch names.
recovery_objective: Roll back via redeploy-previous or `git revert`; target service restored within 30 minutes, verified by the deploy smoke test.
